shared_properties: Echo keeps a 24x36 px mini-silhouette that clearly derives from Umbra through crest shape, eye-glow, and mist fringe.
Core palette metadata remains primary #C9A84C, background #0D0B14, and accent #D4682A while translucency-support colors stay inside specs.colors_hex.
The pose is authored for stationary placement on the scale assembly and preserves readable feet contact at small size.
differences: Echo is smaller, semi-transparent, and less expressive than Umbra to communicate a weight-distribution summon.
Four frames cycle a gentle spectral pulse instead of locomotion to reinforce that the clone stays fixed until recalled.
A teal aura ring appears around the lower body to separate Echo from direct damage feedback.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Echo size, fixed placement, and the two-clone reserve rule.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the spectral teal accent used for shadow-safe utility objects.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the family resemblance between Umbra and Echo.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load the echo atlas during FloorLoading and register it for EchoAnchor entities.
runtime_notes: Loop the idle pulse at 6 fps while the clone exists.
Author translucency into the sheet rather than with runtime alpha pulses.
Anchor the center-bottom pivot to the same baseline logic used by Umbra.

context.usage: Summoned weight clone placed on the scale assembly to adjust torque without moving the main player body.

pose_notes: Aura ring extends 3 px beyond the feet.
Body width never exceeds 20 px inside the 24 px canvas.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 96x36 px with 4 frames of 24x36 px and 0 px spacing.
The clone is visibly related to Umbra while remaining distinct through smaller scale and aura treatment.
The silhouette stays readable on the scale assembly without being mistaken for a particle effect.
